3323140.name: Catto Chateau
3323140.description:
Catto Chateau is a non-linear metroidvania with ethereal vibes. Banish the Duchess's phantoms and other vile monsters as Memo the ghost cat! Explore the haunted Chateau and uncover its many hidden treasures and secrets! You will also test your feline reflexes and ghostly abilities in a variety of levels scattered around the Chateau's halls. Only you and Memo can save the village from the Duchess's corrupting magic!



Game Features

  • Complete a multitude of levels of your choice as you discover them in the Chateau!

  • Warp between said levels with some AMAZING MIRRORS!

  • Learn new spells and abilities to combat vile phantoms and navigate new areas!

  • Rescue the villagers to open up new shops and gain new ways to bolster your abilities.

  • 16 unique Bosses to conquer in the final release.

  • Music by genius composer and silly fella Certified Organic

Plot

Our heroine awakens as a ghost, manifesting in the village's fountain. The ominous chateau looms in the distance. With no idea how she died. All she knows is something happened to the Chateau and her once dear friend: The Duchess! The villagers are corrupted, and phantoms plague the Chateau's halls!


Warning: Game contains imagery that may be harmful to players with photosensitive epilepsy or similar condition.
